metadata.name: Provide First Responders with Building Entry Codes

description: Firefighters responding to an alarm at a commercial building need the entry codes to get inside.

nodes.task_description: Receive a request for access codes from a fire captain at the scene of an alarm.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent acknowledges the request from the first responder.

nodes.task_description: Look up the building address in the secure 'Knox Box' database.
Securely transmit the building's door and elevator access codes to the fire captain's authenticated device.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides the critical access information securely.
